name: filleted_box_demo
_comment: Minimal exercise of the fillet_constant_radius primitive. Box 20x20x10mm on Front Plane, then 2mm constant-radius fillet on the +X edge of the +z face. The edge midpoint is at part (10, 0, 10) -- the +X corner of the top face. No locals.txt: radius is a literal. To make it parametric, replace `radius: 2.0` with `radius: {"rhs": "\"S1B_PRINT_FILLET_R\""}` and add a `locals` path.

features._comment: Fillet the +X-top edge. The box's top face is at z=10mm; the +X edge of that face runs along y at x=10. Pick midpoint (10, 0, 10) in mm.
features.name: Fillet_TopRightEdge
